description: Documentation drift prevention: after any change, sync README claims, changelog entries, ADR links, and API docs with what the code now actually does — docs updated in the same change that invalidated them. Includes /docs-upkeep:check.

interface.longDescription:
Documentation drift prevention: after any change, sync README claims, changelog entries, ADR links, and API docs with what the code now actually does — docs updated in the same change that invalidated them. Includes /docs-upkeep:check.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).
interface.shortDescription: Documentation drift prevention: after any change, sync README claims, changelog entries, ADR links, and API docs with what the code now actually does — docs updated in the same change that invalidated them. Includes /docs-upkeep:check.

name: docs-upkeep
